mapper.select: SELECT id, product_name, category, supply_price, gross_rate, supplier_rating, supplier_contact, user_id, user_name, city, gender, age, buy_time, quantity, total_amount FROM domestic_products
SELECT category, COUNT(*) AS count FROM domestic_products GROUP BY category
SELECT city, COUNT(*) AS count FROM domestic_products GROUP BY city
SELECT DATE_FORMAT(buy_time, '%Y-%m') AS month, COUNT(*) AS order_count, SUM(total_amount) AS total_money FROM domestic_products GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(buy_time, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY month
